property.$description: Property tokens — keyed by the full CSS property that reaches <color>, DERIVED from @webref/css (the StylePropertyMapReadOnly.keys() surface), not invented semantic roles. $value is the short SHA of a derived atom (content address: any color of that content). $role is the contrast role. Complete coverage of the derived color-property set.

-webkit-text-fill-color.$description: CSS `-webkit-text-fill-color` — text, pairs with background-color at 7:1 AAA. Points to any color with content hash 04844ca5 (currently oklch-23_84-0_0204-162_64-1).
